title: MethodPrediction
description: One method's predictions for one (seed, persona) tuple. Submission to the rolling leaderboard packages one such file per persona under <method_dir>/<seed>/<persona_id>.json. See SUBMISSION_PROTOCOL.md.

method_name.description: Paper-facing alias matching the leaderboard column.

seed.description: Seed identifier as registered in configs/seeds.yaml (e.g. 's20260321').

persona_id.description: Persona id matching a directory under data/benchmark/seeds/<seed>/.

predictions.description: Map from question id to a single prediction.

metadata.description: Optional reproduction metadata (commit hash, env, wall-clock).

answer.description: Either a label from the question's answer_space or the literal 'SKIP'.

raw_answer.description: Optional pre-skip label. Must not equal 'SKIP'. For non-skip predictions, must equal answer or be null.
